name: EDU-Planner-Multiagent-LLM
description: An intelligent education planner powered by multi-agent Large Language Models (LLMs). It automates personalized learning paths and curriculum generation.
impact: Revolutionizes personalized learning by using AI agents to coordinate complex educational tasks.

name: Fine-Tuned-Understanding-Enhancing-Social-Bot-Detection
description: A deep learning project focused on detecting social media bots through fine-tuned NLP models. It enhances the accuracy of identifying automated spam/coordinated behavior.
impact: Improves digital platform integrity by proactively identifying and neutralizing sophisticated bot networks.

name: Universal-AI-API-Agent
description: A versatile full-stack agent designed for complex API automation and tool integration. It can interact with various external services to perform autonomous tasks.
impact: Bridges the gap between LLMs and real-world tools, allowing AI to perform practical, cross-platform actions.

name: AI_Study_Assistant-RAG
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) assistant built with Django for smart study assistance. It allows users to upload documents and ask questions based on their own knowledge base.
impact: Provides high-accuracy document-based answering, perfect for students managing large amounts of data.

name: Mern-chat-bot_Gemini
description: A full-featured real-time chat bot integrated with Google's Gemini API, built on the MERN stack.
impact: Demonstrates high-level proficiency in modern JavaScript full-stack development and AI integration.

name: Plant-Analysis_tool__Gemini
description: An AI-powered image analysis tool that identifies plant species and provides care recommendations using computer vision and Gemini.
impact: Utilizes multi-modal AI capabilities to solve real-world problems in botany and gardening.
